name: MERCURY GENERAL CORP
business: Mercury General Corporation is primarily engaged in writing personal automobile insurance, and also writes homeowners, commercial automobile, commercial property, mechanical protection, and umbrella insurance. The company sells policies through a network of approximately 8,510 independent agents, its wholly owned insurance agencies, and directly through internet sales portals. The company operates in 11 states, principally California.

exposures.sentence: Mercury General Corporation ('Mercury General') and its subsidiaries (referred to herein collectively as the 'Company') are primarily engaged in writing personal automobile insurance through 12 insurance subsidiaries (referred to herein collectively as the 'Insurance Companies') in 11 states, principally California.
The Company has invested in improvements to automation, customer and agent experience, internal process efficiencies, and cybersecurity protections in 2025.
In 2026, the Company expects to continue to invest in customer and agent experience, automation, cybersecurity, and in the decommissioning of legacy systems.

catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, the California DOI approved a 12% rate increase on the California homeowners line of insurance business. This rate increase became effective in March 2025.

catalysts.event: California commercial automobile rate increase effective
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, the California DOI approved a 9.6% rate increase on the California commercial automobile line of insurance business. This rate increase became effective in November 2025.

catalysts.event: California homeowners rate increase expected effective
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, the California DOI approved a 6.9% rate increase on the California homeowners line of insurance business. This rate increase is expected to become effective in July 2026.
